final_prompt.prompt: 参考这些LOGO和结合网上公司的logo设计，帮我用英文ZD设计一个玩具公司的logo，要求简约一点，边缘不要太锋利，,英文要抽象一点，可以结合一点水滴元素，水滴元素要和logo相结合，融合到一起，不要直接加上去一个水滴，整个logo要有整体性，不要太割裂，要有创新和设计感[@image:#1:524b8f6461ac4e1c0e9e301a4fd91ca5]

raw: {"prompt": "Logo design for a toy company using the letters \"ZD\". Style: minimalist, rounded soft edges (no sharp corners), abstract letterform treatment. Water droplet element must be organically integrated into the letterforms — not added as a separate decorative element, but morphed into the curves or negative space of \"Z\" or \"D\" so the whole mark reads as one unified shape. The logo should feel cohesive, innovative, and design-forward. Clean flat vector graphic, white background, single color or two-tone palette.", "size": "1024x1024", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
